collaborationIdentifier.note: When dependent op needs 'collaborationIdentifier' param, use for_each=aws.cleanrooms.list_members and set collaborationIdentifier='{{ item.abilities }}'

configuredAudienceModelAssociationIdenti.note: When dependent op needs 'configuredAudienceModelAssociationIdentifier' param, use for_each=aws.cleanrooms.list_configured_audience_model_associations and set configuredAudienceModelAssociationIdentifier='{{ item.configuredAudienceModelArn }}'

membershipIdentifier.note: When dependent op needs 'membershipIdentifier' param, use for_each=aws.cleanrooms.list_configured_tables and set membershipIdentifier='{{ item.analysisRuleTypes }}'

name.note: When dependent op needs 'name' param, use for_each=aws.cleanrooms.list_collaborations and set name='{{ item.name }}'

privacyBudgetType.note: When dependent op needs 'privacyBudgetType' param, use for_each=aws.cleanrooms.list_collaboration_privacy_budgets and set privacyBudgetType='{{ item.budget }}'

type.note: When dependent op needs 'type' param, use for_each=aws.cleanrooms.list_schemas and set type='{{ item.type }}'
